content.en:
"Use a replica body to attract some demon seeds first, and then kill them!"

Ye Tian decided.

Otherwise, he would not be an opponent if he dealt with too many demon seeds at once.

When Ye Tian approached the area of the abyss of despair, getting closer and closer to the abyss of the demon seed, the demon seeds appeared.

Before, these Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds had been staying in the abyss of despair and did not come out, and they only came out when he was about to leave.

But this time, Ye Tian undoubtedly angered them.

Therefore, as soon as he approached, these Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds couldn't wait to kill him.

"Eighteen Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds!"

Ye Tian sensed it, and these eighteen Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds were all very powerful, and they all took out the Chilin Ancient Spear made from the branches of the Chilin Ancient Tree, and their combat power soared in an instant.

Rumble!!!!!

Eighteen Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds made a move, Ye Tian smiled, and directly cast the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique-Xuanxing Scale Armor Technique!

In an instant, his body seemed to be dressed in a close-fitting scale armor suit, and the strength of his body became stronger.

"26 spears of the sun!"

Ye Tian killed the past, instantly penetrating the body of a demon seed, shattering its body.

And the attacks of the other demon seeds fell on him, and they were easily resisted.

"It's not good, run away!"

After these demon seeds realized that Ye Tian's strength was terrifying, they wanted to escape.

However, it was too late.

"Sunrise Domain!"

"Sun's Grip!"

"Give me death!"

Rumble!!!!!

This area was blocked by Ye Tian, and some of the weaker demon seeds were directly crushed by the Grip of the Ruin Sun, and they fell on the spot.

"Kill!"

The light of the spear of the ruin sun swayed out, covering this area, and all the demon seeds could not bear it, and they were killed by the bombardment.

"You're looking for death!"

There was a roar from the abyss of despair.

Seeing that the demon seed Gu Duan came over with other demon seeds, he originally thought that the eighteen Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds would be able to surround and kill Ye Tian, but he didn't expect to underestimate Ye Tian's strength, causing the eighteen Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds to be killed in a short period of time.

This is a huge loss for the abyss of despair!

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian's eyes were staring at the demon seed Gu Dui, this guy still gave him the feeling of danger, but he didn't have the strength to fight, and he still had multiple copy bodies!

Rumble!

Demon Seed Gu Dusk himself was huge, and he was holding a huge wooden spear, which was far from comparable to other Chilin Ancient Spears.

This should be the real Chilin Ancient Tree, which has been refined into this spear, and the other Chilin Ancient Spears are just made from a few branches.

It can be said that the power of this Chilin Ancient Spear is already above the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Suddenly.

Another demon seed whose strength was about equivalent to condensing a realm spirit at the beginning of the Eternal Realm God Realm actually took out an Eternal Demon Pillar, which was estimated to be the No. 2 Demon Seed of the Abyss of Despair.

Seeing this Eternal Demon Pillar, he showed interest.

With the Eternal Demon Pillar, coupled with the body of this Chilin Ancient Spear, he could give all the other Eternal Demon Pillars to his three relatives.

That way, just right.

Of course.

The premise is that he can slay these demon seeds.

"It's time to go all out!"

One of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies also took out the Eternal Demon Pillar, if there was no Eternal Demon Pillar, he would not be able to stop the Demon Seed Gu Dusk who was holding the Chilin Ancient Spear.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian and Gu Dusk were killed together, but Ye Tian burned the Eternal Dao Seed desperately, coupled with the defense of the Xuanxing Scale Armor Technique, he stubbornly blocked the demon seed Gu Dui.

In Ye Tian's estimation, the strength of the demon seed Gu Dui was about the same as that of a normal Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse who had condensed three Eternal Realm spirits, and his strength was a little more powerful than him, but it was not too exaggerated.

The other demon species wanted to assist Gu Dui, but Ye Tian's other copy bodies intervened and intercepted them.

Thundered!!!!!

The killing was going on, Ye Tian's copy body killed these demon seeds one by one, and even the No. 2 demon seed holding the Eternal Demon Pillar couldn't stop Ye Tian, and was killed by Ye Tian in a short time, and this Eternal Demon Pillar belonged to him.

Of course, the duplicate body that was killed with the demon seed Gu Dusk was also not lightly injured.

However, the other besieging Demon Seed Gu Twilight who copied their bodies to die also doubled the pressure on Demon Seed Gu Dui.

In this way, the slaughter went on for a long time.

Finally, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies couldn't bear it, and he exhausted the Eternal Dao Seed and died.

At this time, the demon seed Gu Twilight saw a glimmer of hope.

However, not long after, another replica body of Ye Tian arrived and joined the battlefield.

"Why do you have so many doppelgangers!!"

Demon Seed Ancient Twilight was incredulous.

However, Ye Tian would not answer him, he just wanted to kill him.

Gradually, the demon seed Gu Dui wanted to escape, but Ye Tian would not let him escape.

Under Ye Tian's constant desperateness, the demon seed Gu Dui finally couldn't bear it.

Rumble!

Its massive body fell, its vitality annihilated, the eternal demon seed shattered, and its consciousness completely dissipated.

"Finally dead!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately, he showed excitement.

These 240 Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds are dead, so the Abyss of Despair belongs to him.

Immediately, he began to collect the resources on these demon seeds.

The Chilin Ancient Spear must be collected, and this is a good thing!

Then, he went into the depths of the abyss of despair and began to collect resources.

"There are really a lot of good things, although a lot of good things will affect the demon seed, but it's not a problem for me!"

Ye Tian continued to search in the abyss of despair and obtained a large number of treasure resources, among which there were many resources that helped the Eternal Realm God Realm to improve the Eternal Dao Species, and the resources of the Evil Punishment Vine were all ordinary.

Moreover, Ye Tian had also found a treasure that would help cultivate the spirit of the realm.

【Dark Flower of the Realm】

This is a kind of Boundary Spirit Flower, the Boundary Spirit Flower is divided into the Boundary Spirit Golden Flower, the Boundary Spirit Blood Flower and the Boundary Spirit Dark Flower, among which the Boundary Spirit Dark Flower has the greatest side effects, although it can help condense the Boundary Spirit, but it will also cause the eternal demon seed to become a demon seed.

Therefore, only the kind of Eternal Realm Divine Realm, where there was no problem with the Eternal Dao species, was suitable for refining the Realm Spirit Dark Flower.

However, Ye Tian was not afraid of this kind of realm spirit dark flower, and his relatives were not afraid either.

"The Eternal Realm Spirit Tree can only condense one Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit at a time, and it is not enough for me and Yue'er, Xingchen, and Xingyue to use it, but this time I obtained the Realm Spirit Dark Flower, but it solved the problem. "

Ye Tian muttered.
